prompt: DevBoss 5-hour sprint continuation: exercise end-to-end-loop and caveman-code on locally available/provided repositories, especially tdrrecherche; stay read-only/dry-run for target repos; record evidence, blockers, learning candidates, and Copilot availability; validate changed end-to-end-loop artifacts; no live deploy or destructive target changes.
commands_or_evidence: Target main worktree /opt/data/repos/tdrrecherche is on main at f45b2c9 with clean status; feature worktree /opt/data/worktrees/tdrrecherche/feat-complete-wordpress-design-samples is on feat/complete-wordpress-design-samples at bde99b7 with clean status.
No .end-to-end-loop memory files were present in the target feature worktree; PROJECT_STATE.md and README.md were read for handoff constraints.
Scenario chosen: read-only production handoff audit for static sampler/prototypes, focused on whether local links/assets/legal-contact cues are sufficient before WordPress conversion.

Static HTML audit over index.html and variants A-E found no broken local anchor links, no missing local images, no img tags missing alt attributes, and all six pages include title text plus legal/privacy-related text snippets.

Same audit found production blockers/follow-ups: no external links, no mailto/tel contact links, no privacy href despite privacy text, no cookie mention, all images lack explicit width/height attributes, and all detected images are not loading=lazy.
Local HTTP smoke returned 200 for /, all five standalone variants, and the three generated PNG assets; content lengths matched expected static files.
node --check wordpress-theme/tdr-recherche/assets/js/theme.js passed; PHP lint remains blocked because php is not installed.
Refined text credential scan found only documentation terms in PROJECT_STATE.md for `secret`/`token`, not concrete credentials; target git status remained clean.

Copilot path checked: gh is authenticated and the gh copilot wrapper help is present, but no Copilot findings were generated because invoking it would auto-download the Copilot CLI in this dry-run environment.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Discover target repo state and any .end-to-end-loop memory
acceptance_criteria.evidence: Main f45b2c9 and feature bde99b7 worktrees are clean; target .end-to-end-loop memory files were not present.
Selected production handoff audit because prior runs identified contact/legal/accessibility readiness as unresolved before conversion.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Exercise the loop as far as safe with real commands/read-only checks
acceptance_criteria.evidence: Ran parser-based HTML link/image/legal audit, local HTTP smoke, JS syntax check, refined text credential scan, Copilot availability check, and git status checks without target writes.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Record evidence, blockers, learning candidates, and Copilot availability
acceptance_criteria.evidence: This result log records local smoke success plus blockers for privacy href, contact links, cookie/legal decision, image intrinsic dimensions/lazy loading, PHP lint, and Copilot review unavailability.
This JSON result log was followed by skill validation, JSON validation, and diff whitespace checks recorded in the final report.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Do not live deploy or destructively modify target repos
acceptance_criteria.evidence: No deploy, package install, destructive command, target commit, or target file write was performed; target git status remained clean.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Static sampler is production-handoff ready without more decisions
acceptance_criteria.evidence: No mailto/tel/external contact links, no privacy href, no cookie mention, no explicit image width/height/lazy attributes, placeholder contact handling from prior run, and no PHP runtime/lint path.

learning_candidates.text: Production handoff dry-runs for static WordPress prototypes should audit local anchors/assets plus mailto/tel/privacy/cookie/legal cues and image width/height/lazy attributes.
learning_candidates.reason: Reusable read-only gate discovered handoff gaps beyond parseability and form scaffolding; privacy-safe.

learning_candidates.text: Presence of privacy/AVG/KVK text is not enough for production readiness when no privacy href, cookie/legal decision, or real contact route exists.
learning_candidates.reason: Prevents false green claims for static-to-WordPress conversion readiness.

learning_candidates.text: gh copilot may auto-download the Copilot CLI when invoked; in dry-run target audits, record wrapper/auth status but avoid tool installation unless explicitly in scope.
learning_candidates.reason: Clarifies side-effect boundary for future Copilot checks.

copilot_findings.summary: GitHub CLI is authenticated and gh copilot help is available, but no Copilot review was run because invoking it would auto-download the Copilot CLI, which was outside this read-only/dry-run target audit scope.

notes: Read-only/dry-run audit broadened the readiness picture: local static delivery is healthy, but production handoff still needs real contact/privacy/legal decisions and performance/accessibility polish. Only end-to-end-loop evaluation artifacts were written.
